EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a Admiral scheme customer at the second attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Unable to reach - Best time to call? ADM
EmailTemplate.subject: Don’t miss out on your renewal benefits
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I’ve not yet been able to reach you to discuss your renewal quote over the phone.
I don’t want you to lose out on these key benefits:
- Up to £2,500 tools and equipment cover included as standard at no extra cost (with in-van cover!) - Next business day payout on accepted tool theft claims, helping to get Britain's tradespeople back on the job faster. - Nil excess and no hidden fees on most professions covered, reducing out-of-pocket or unexpected costs. - UK-based in-house specialists, including easy, quick access to brokers, and rapid, responsive claims processing managed by a dedicated claims team. - All core covers in one place, wrapped into a single neat, affordable package attached to one easy payment.
It would be good to discuss your requirements to make sure your renewal quote is right for your business. Is there a good time for me to give you a call?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
